mapper.select: select uc.user_coupon_id as userCouponId, uc.user_id as userId, uc.status as status, uc.valid_start as validStart, uc.valid_end as validEnd, uc.order_id as orderId, ct.coupon_template_id as couponTemplateId, ct.coupon_type as couponType, ct.face_value as couponFaceValue, ct.discount_rate as couponDiscountRate, ct.threshold_amount as couponThresholdAmount, ct.applicable_contest_ids as applicableContestIds, ct.status as templateStatus from jst_user_coupon uc inner join jst_coupon_template ct on ct.coupon_template_id = uc.coupon_template_id and ct.del_flag = '0' where uc.user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId} and uc.del_flag = '0' limit 1
